search_queries: 2026 federal gift tax annual exclusion amount IRS
2026 annual gift tax exclusion non-citizen spouse IRS Rev Proc 2025-32
contract_notes: Report two values: (1) per_donee_exclusion — the annual exclusion per donee under IRC §2503(b), and (2) non_citizen_spouse_exclusion — the annual exclusion for gifts to a non-citizen spouse under IRC §2523(i).
Both values are dollar amounts for calendar year 2026.
The per-donee exclusion applies per recipient per year. A married couple can each give this amount (gift splitting under §2513).
Source is IRS Rev. Proc. 2025-32 and/or the IRS newsroom announcement of 2026 inflation adjustments.
